subcodes.first_line: O thou who turnest thy face towards God! That which thou hast written hath been perused. Correspondence and communication are of two kinds [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مقبل الی الله آنچه نگاشتی ملاحظه گردید مخابره و مکاتبه بر دو قسم است
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @spiritual transformation, @humility; meekness; lowliness
